criteria.text: Tasks and Opportunities each have a SINGLE sidebar link (no nested Board sub-entries)
An in-page List/Board view switcher renders right after the page title on BOTH list and board views, keeping a stable position when toggling
Board pages route at /tasks/board and /opportunities/board; the /{record} route does not swallow /board
The Board segment hides entirely when the status/stage custom field is missing (preserves prior canAccess behavior)
Legacy /{tenant}/tasks-board and /{tenant}/opportunities-board URLs 301-redirect to the new resource board routes
Board functionality (drag/drop card between columns) still works after the move to resource pages
